old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-m6kn","title":"EDHOC: Hardcoded correlation value assumes CoAP transport","description":"CORRECTNESS: edhoc_initiator_create_msg1 hardcodes corr=1 in METHOD_CORR encoding.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:431

uint8_t method_corr = ctx->method * 4 + 1;  // corr=1 hardcoded

Per RFC 9528:
- corr indicates transport-specific correlation method
- corr=1 is for CoAP with client-initiated requests
- Other transports may require different correlation values

Impact: Cannot be used over non-CoAP transports without modification.

Fix: Make correlation value configurable via context or init parameter.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:431","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:02.331811Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:02.33185Z"}
